net_term_days.description: Chargebee's real wire type is a JSON integer; this bundle's computed_fields envelope-unwrap mechanism (engine.Interpolate) always stringifies, see docs.md Known limits.

created_at.description: Unix seconds, stringified by computed_fields (see docs.md Known limits).

updated_at.description: Unix seconds, stringified by computed_fields (see docs.md Known limits).

deleted.description: Boolean, stringified by computed_fields (see docs.md Known limits).
